data.title: River City Bank declares $0.37 dividend
data.description:
• River City Bank (OTCPK:RCBC) declares $0.37/share quarterly dividend, in line with previous.
  • Forward yield 0.53%
  • Payable Nov. 12; for shareholders of record Oct. 29; ex-div Oct. 29.
  • See RCBC Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth.

data.title: HeartCore sees Q3 revenue between $17M and $19M
data.description:
• HeartCore Enterprises (NASDAQ:HTCR) on Friday said it expects revenues for the third quarter of 2024 to be between $17 million and $19 million, representing an increase of between 263% and 305%.
  • Consensus for Q3 revenue is $17.68M.
  • Revenues for the nine months ended September 30 are expected to be between $26 million and $28 million, representing an increase of between 40% and 51%.
  • Net income is expected to be between $9 million and $11 million for the third quarter of 2024, compared to a net loss of $2.5 million in the same period last year. Net income for the nine months ended September 30, 2024 is expected to be between $5 million and $7 million, compared to a net loss of $1.8 million in the same period last year.
  • HTCR +16.16% premarket to $1.15.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Nokia to cut ~2k jobs in China, plans for EU workforce reduction - Reuters
A.I.S. Resources announces private placement financing
data.description:
• A.I.S. Resources (OTCPK:AISSF) announced a non-brokered private placement of up to 8.6M units at a  $0.035 per unit for gross proceeds of $301,000.
  • The company may pay finders fees of up to 8% cash and 8% finders warrants on a portion of the placement.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Housing starts, building permits unexpectedly slump in September
data.description:
• September Housing Starts: -0.5% M/M to 1.354M vs. 1.400M consensus and 1.361M prior (revised from 1.356M).
  • Building Permits: -2.9% M/M to 1.428M vs. 1.500M consensus and 1.470M prior (revised from 1.475M).

data.title: Nixxy shares fall as co reports CognoGroup spin-off plans
data.description:
• Nixxy (NASDAQ:NIXX) is moving forward with its plans to consolidate several of its assets and liabilities into Atlantic Energy Solutions, which is planned to be renamed CognoGroup, the company said on Friday.
  • NIXX -8.89% premarket to $2.46.
  • As part of this restructuring, Nixxy will distribute shares of CognoGroup to eligible shareholders.
  • After the planned spin-out, CognoGroup's portfolio will include several AI-driven ventures designed to empower individuals and industries, Nixxy (NIXX) said in a statement.
  • These businesses include CandidatePitch, an automated talent marketing tool; Mediabistro, a media industry job board; AI Exchange, a community with over one million members focused on AI discussions; and PrimeGPU, an early-stage venture currently in stealth mode.
  • Investors representing approximately 75% of Nixxy's outstanding shares have verbally waived participation in the distribution of the spin-out shares.
  • On Thursday, Nixxy (NIXX) said it would acquire a privately held wholesale gifts business, and targets an enterprise value of over $1 billion over the next 36 months.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Heliogen appoints Apurba Das as chief technology officer
data.description:
• Heliogen (OTCQX:HLGN) Friday reported the appointment of Apurba Das, as Chief Technology Officer.
  • Das has been with Heliogen since 2021, and has been instrumental in advancing technology and innovation initiatives as Vice President of Engineering for Process and Power Systems.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Scaling Capital 1 buys Matador Gold Technologies
data.description:
• Scaling Capital 1 (SKAL.P:CA) entered an agreement with Matador Gold Technologies, a private arm's length company headquartered in Ontario.
  • Under the agreement, Scaling (SKAL.P:CA) will acquire all shares of Matador on the basis of one post-consolidation common share of the company for each one Matador share.
  • The company intend to complete a minimum of 7M financing and a maximum of 9M Matador shares at $0.50 per share to raise minimum gross proceeds of $3.5M and maximum gross proceeds of $4.5M.
  • The closing of the concurrent financing is not conditional on the closing of the transaction.

data.title: Intel said to look for minority partners in programmable chip unit: report
data.description:
• Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) is looking to raise billions of dollars from minority partners for its programmable chip unit, known as Altera, CNBC reported.
  • Shares rose 0.6% in premarket trading on Friday, but have declined more than 50% year-to-date amid concerns about the viability of its turnaround prospects.
  • Santa Clara, Calif.-based Intel is looking for investors to provide capital to the unit, which makes chips for high-performance communications and data center applications, and would value Altera at $17B, the news outlet added, citing people familiar with the matter. The company has contacted private equity firms and strategic investors, the people added.
  • The Pat Gelsinger-led Intel has also told some of those investors that a majority stake in Altera could also be a possibility. Intel acquired Altera in 2015 for a sum of $16.7B.
  • Intel did not immediately respond to a request for comment from Seeking Alpha.
  • In October 2023, Intel said it would separate Altera into a standalone operation, effective January 1, 2024, in an effort to continue to simplify its larger business.
